entries.notes:
We decided to catch some tadpoles and try to nurture them until they turn into frogs. On the way to the bus this morning, Madeline and Miles scooped a bunch of tadpoles out of the ditch and we brought them home with plenty of their original water, mud, sticks, and leaves.

They’re now swimming around in a shallow container, and there are so many of them. We’re going to observe them for a while, learn what they need, and see how they change over the next few weeks.

And so a farm science project begins!
